visual_description: In a dark night scene, faint lights reflect on water before cutting to two men seated against a tiled wall. The man in a shiny, sequined jacket holds a phone to his ear while the other man in dark clothing looks on. A close-up shows the man in the shiny jacket continuing his call, followed by a side view of another man in a suit also on the phone.
audio_description: The sound of a phone conversation is audible, with a voice speaking through the receiver.
